registryDoctrine: Every election entry projects a Phase 40 governance-attested OrgFrameworkElection into the sync code path. Adding an entry requires (1) a real electionEvidenceRef into Phase 40 governance, (2) electedAt ISO-8601 timestamp, (3) electedBy user id, (4) an electionScope, (5) a founder-authored commit. Cursor and AI workers MUST NOT append entries. Empty arrays are the correct ship state until the founder has governance evidence in hand.
citationDoctrine: Eligibility for IFRS-SME (FrameworkCode IFRS_SME) is governed by IFRS for SMEs Section 1: an entity must (a) not have public accountability, and (b) publish general-purpose financial statements (IFRS Foundation, IFRS for SMEs Section 1, paragraphs 1.2 and 1.5). Ineligible entries (e.g. a public filer electing IFRS_SME) MUST be rejected by the loader.
